title: Sleep Fixer
description: Plugin that fixes sleep mechanics of TimeManager plugin.
body:
This is a simple plugin that fixes TimeManager's "**The GameRule sleepingIgnored is set to true for this player. <PlayerName>'s sleep process ends here.**". Which doesn't let the player sleep though the night.
  
  By default the auto-fix-sleep is turned off in the configuration file, you can turn it on or just use the command.
  
  I made this plugin because I haven't seen any alternative nor setting in TimeManager for this problem and posted it here, maybe someone will find it useful.
  
  Usage: **/sleepfix <playerName> <get/set/reload> [value]**. The **[value]** field is only used for **<set>** subcommand and can be set to **true** or **false**.
  If you wish to take a look or modify the code, you can take a look at:[https://github.com/AlviMCM/SleepFixer/tree/main](https://github.com/AlviMCM/SleepFixer/tree/main)
